subcodes.first_line: O Ghufur! This Wronged One, imprisoned for the sake of God, hath turned from the precincts of the Prison unto thee and calleth thee to the most exalted horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غفور این مظلوم مسجون لوجه الله از شطر سجن بتو توجه نموده و ترا بافق اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation, @call to action
